title: Password reset
text: Users can reset their password from the login page using the 'Forgot password' link. Password reset emails usually arrive within 5 minutes. Support agents cannot manually view existing passwords.

title: Withdrawal review
text: Withdrawals may be placed into manual review for security checks. Most reviews complete within 24 hours, but some may take longer if additional verification is required.

title: Address verification
text: Accepted proof of address documents include utility bills and bank statements dated within the last 6 months. Screenshots are not accepted.

title: Demo accounts
text: Demo accounts use virtual funds and do not support real deposits or withdrawals.

title: Responsible AI policy
text: Assistant responses must not invent account actions, legal conclusions, or compliance outcomes that are not supported by retrieved evidence.
